assertions.assertion: Output sets options.Authentication.CookieLifetime to TimeSpan.FromHours(8) and CookieSlidingExpiration to false

assertions.rationale: Response does NOT set options.PushedAuthorization.Required = true. Instead, it mentions setting RequirePushedAuthorization on individual client configurations, which is a different per-client property, not the global PushedAuthorization.Required option.

assertions.assertion: Output sets options.Caching.ClientStoreExpiration and options.Caching.ResourceStoreExpiration to TimeSpan.FromMinutes(10)
assertions.rationale: Response does NOT set options.Caching.ClientStoreExpiration or options.Caching.ResourceStoreExpiration. It vaguely mentions adding IDistributedCache and configuring caching middleware, but doesn't use the correct Duende IdentityServerOptions.Caching properties.
